questions.question: Write a Python function to find the maximum element in an unsorted list of integers. Explain the time complexity of your solution.
questions.hint: Use built-in Python functions and data structures.

questions.question: Compare and contrast Stack and Queue data structures. Provide an example of when to use each.
questions.hint: Focus on the operations supported by each data structure.

questions.question: How would you implement a hash table in Python? Include explanations of the hash function and collision resolution techniques.
questions.hint: Discuss the trade-offs between different implementation choices.
